atomic_facts.fact: The screen displays a static end card with social media information.
The text 'FOOD & WINE' is positioned at the top of the frame.
The YouTube URL 'youtube.com/foodandwine' is listed next to the YouTube icon.
The website 'foodandwine.com/madgeniustips' is listed next to an ampersand.
The handle '@foodandwine' and hashtag '#madgeniustips' are listed next to the Twitter and Instagram icons.

The YouTube icon is to the left of its URL, the ampersand is to the left of the website address, and the Twitter and Instagram icons are to the left of the handle and hashtag.
